name: fix-all-issues
description: Quality-first parallel PR review and remediation workflow. Finds issues with lens reviewers plus a red-team and coverage agent, verifies every finding, triages with an independent second pass, fixes with mutation-style evidence, runs a dedicated cleanup round, validates with a live feature exercise, and reports residual risks.

interface.shortDescription: Quality-first parallel PR review with verification, cleanup, and residual-risk reporting
interface.longDescription: Orchestrate a multi-round PR review and fix workflow optimized for catching every real issue and shipping a clean diff. Default exhaustive mode adds red-team and coverage reviewer lenses, a per-finding verification gate, an independent second triager, mutation-style fix evidence, a dedicated cleanup round, live-feature validation, a cold 'would I block this PR?' reviewer, and a residual-risk inventory. Quick mode preserves the leaner prior pipeline for elapsed-time-sensitive runs.
defaultPrompt: Review my current branch against main and fix every issue you find
